title: Class of 2026 ready to make an impact
summary_en: From future elementary educators and school counselors to educational leaders and mental health professionals, this graduating class reflects both the growing needs of today’s schools and the expanding ways educators make an impact. Among the undergraduate class alone are 17 first-generation students.
title_cn: 2026届毕业生已做好准备发挥积极作用
summary_cn: 近期，教育领域相关就业监测及人才培养机构发布动向显示，2026届各级各类毕业生已完成既定阶段学业任务，整体具备参与社会建设、发挥自身价值的能力与意愿，相关人才培养工作进展符合预期。

title: Geoengineering summit helps students be part of the solution for climate change
summary_en: Around 200 local middle and high school students presented their solutions to climate change during the second annual Geoengineering Summit. Prep for the summit started months earlier, when teachers were given a five-lesson unit and attended the Geoengineering workshop in December.
title_cn: 地球工程峰会助力学生参与气候变化应对工作
summary_cn: 为充分发挥青年群体在气候治理中的作用，地球工程主题教育峰会近期举办，旨在搭建专业交流平台，助力学生群体参与气候变化应对相关工作，为学生深度参与气候公共事务创造条件。
